text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, August 11. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. I've got the grocery list ready. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Checking on some house maintenance items. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. I can help troubleshoot that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. I've got the schedule covered. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Prepping school lunches for the week. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, The lawn mower is having issues starting. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. I can help troubleshoot that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've noted the plans. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Busy day for sports! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
